core.label: OCaml Fundamentals
core.description: Syntax, types, pattern matching, and functional basics.

topics.label: Installation & utop
topics.description: Install OCaml with opam and use utop REPL. OCaml is a functional language with imperative features.

topics.label: Let Bindings & Types
topics.description: let for immutable bindings, type inference, and basic types (int, float, string, bool, char, unit).

topics.label: Functions
topics.description: Define with let, currying, partial application, and recursive functions (let rec).

topics.label: Pattern Matching
topics.description: match...with for exhaustive decomposition. OCaml's most powerful feature.

topics.label: Algebraic Data Types
topics.description: Variants (sum types) and records (product types). Model domains precisely.

topics.label: Lists & Option
topics.description: Immutable linked lists, Option for nullable values, and List module functions.

topics.label: Modules & Signatures
topics.description: Organize code with modules and define interfaces with signatures (module types).

topics.label: Higher-Order Functions
topics.description: List.map, List.filter, List.fold_left, and function composition.

topics.label: Error Handling
topics.description: Result type (Ok/Error), Option, and exceptions. Prefer Result over exceptions.

topics.label: Dune Build System
topics.description: Build OCaml projects with Dune. Dune is the standard OCaml build system.
